full_text:
Hao Zhou (Kongyi) 浩周
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hao Zhou (浩周), styledKongyi, was born in Shang Dang. Captured at Fan, he would later assure Cao Pi that Sun Quan would keep his promise. Hao Zhou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
